name: Entrance to the Forest of Graye
description:
The trail passes into the shade here, and the temperature drops quite
suddenly.  Great broad leaf trees gather the descending sunlight, and cover the
leaf-strewn forest floor with dappled sunlight.  The wagon trail becomes much
wider here, showing signs of recent heavy use.  The wagon trail runs from west
to east here, and it looks possible to venture into the forest to the north and
south.
